subject: Databases
title: UPDATE Changes Rows
description: Learn UPDATE Changes Rows in one minute.

hook.text: A user changed their email. UPDATE users SET email = 'new@test.com' WHERE id = 42. One row updated.

buildup.text: SET specifies the new values. WHERE picks which rows to change. Both are essential.

discovery.text: You can update multiple columns at once: SET name = 'Ada', email = 'ada@new.com'.

twist.text: Forget the WHERE clause? UPDATE users SET email = 'oops' changes EVERY row. Dangerous.

climax.text: Always test updates with a SELECT first. See which rows match before you change them.

punchline.text: UPDATE without WHERE hits every row. Always double-check.

quiz.question: What happens if you run UPDATE without a WHERE clause?
options: Every row in the table gets updated with the new values
Only the first row is updated
